content: The surprise-based intrinsic reward signals that power ICM and RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent long-term episodic memory, where only memory traces that still evoke prediction surprise are retained and retrieved for downstream planning. This creates a self-tuning memory system that automatically discards stale, low-information traces without manual memory consolidation rules.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
